constraints: Return exactly one int from unvisited_nodes.
Never return a visited node or destination_node.
Do not mutate unvisited_nodes or distance_matrix.
content:
Skill: tsp_evolved_adaptive_weights_destination_forward_score
When: early tour steps should favor exploration, late steps should favor return; the tour must return to a destination/depot and the last edge is costly; direct connection cost is the primary selection signal
Do: use remaining_ratio to dynamically adjust forward vs backward weights; score each candidate by d(current,u) + α·d(u,dest); increase α as fewer nodes remain; weight the direct distance from current node to candidate; normalize forward and backward distances to [0,1] before combining
Fallback: nearest neighbor if scores tie or few nodes remain.
Safety: return one valid node; do not mutate inputs; keep computation bounded.
summary: TSP construction heuristic evolved from best code: destination + normalize + adaptive_weights.
title: TSP Destination Normalize Adaptive Weights Evolved Card

constraints: Return exactly one int from unvisited_nodes.
Never return a visited node or destination_node.
Do not mutate unvisited_nodes or distance_matrix.
content:
Skill: tsp_evolved_adaptive_weights_centrality_destination
When: early tour steps should favor exploration, late steps should favor return; some nodes are more central and should be visited strategically; the tour must return to a destination/depot and the last edge is costly
Do: use remaining_ratio to dynamically adjust forward vs backward weights; prefer nodes with high closeness centrality or high MST edge weight; score each candidate by d(current,u) + α·d(u,dest); increase α as fewer nodes remain; weight the direct distance from current node to candidate
Fallback: nearest neighbor if scores tie or few nodes remain.
Safety: return one valid node; do not mutate inputs; keep computation bounded.
summary: TSP construction heuristic evolved from best code: regret + destination + normalize.
title: TSP Regret Destination Normalize Evolved Card

constraints: Return exactly one int from unvisited_nodes.
Never return a visited node or destination_node.
Do not mutate unvisited_nodes or distance_matrix.
content:
Skill: tsp_evolved_centrality_destination_farthest
When: some nodes are more central and should be visited strategically; the tour must return to a destination/depot and the last edge is costly; distant clusters may be left until too late
Do: prefer nodes with high closeness centrality or high MST edge weight; score each candidate by d(current,u) + α·d(u,dest); increase α as fewer nodes remain; seed distant clusters/regions early; prefer candidates far from current position; weight the direct distance from current node to candidate
Fallback: nearest neighbor if scores tie or few nodes remain.
Safety: return one valid node; do not mutate inputs; keep computation bounded.
summary: TSP construction heuristic evolved from best code: regret + farthest + destination.
title: TSP Regret Farthest Destination Evolved Card
